decisions.title: Scale API infrastructure to address latency cascade
decisions.context: 5 critical API endpoints showing latency issues (GetPhaseAnnotations, BatchResolveCalculatedChannels, GetStructuredData, GetAnnotations, UpdateRunBoundsIfNeeded). This blocks Explore V2 performance goals and customer decision velocity.

arguments.for: Multiple API latency signals indicate systemic performance issue affecting core product experience. Memory crashes on exports (ENG-8287) suggest infrastructure at capacity. Prometheus metrics (ENG-8887) will provide visibility but action needed now.
arguments.against: Could be isolated issues rather than systemic. Should wait for prometheus metrics deployment to diagnose root cause before major infrastructure investment.

decisions.title: Prioritize Python Rules GA over Family Config polish
decisions.context: Family Config has 4 polish tickets (ENG-8954, 8953, 8952, 8951) vs. core Rule Parameterization (ENG-8815) and Python Rules foundation work. Aligns with 'Nail the Core' pillar focus on production-ready rules engine.

arguments.for: Python Rules is strategic moat builder. Polish can wait until core capabilities proven with customers. ENG-8815 Rule Parameterization unlocks programmatic decision capture (North Star metric).
arguments.against: Family Config polish improves immediate UX for existing customers. 4 tickets suggest user friction. Could harm adoption if users struggle with configuration.

decisions.title: Ship Parquet Exports as Sift Edge MVP feature
decisions.context: ENG-8945 Parquet Exports + ENG-8299 Export memory improvements + ENG-8287 worker memory allocation form complete edge deployment story. Aligns with 'Build the Moat' through customer infrastructure integration.
decisions.blockedBy: Export memory optimization (ENG-8299) must complete first to prevent production crashes. Worker memory increase (ENG-8287) is band-aid.

arguments.for: Parquet enables customer data lake integration, key differentiator vs. competitors. Export stability work already in flight. Package as cohesive Edge feature.
arguments.against: Sift Edge scope unclear. Should focus on core stability before adding formats. Parquet may not be primary customer ask.

decisions.title: Deploy ephemeral environments for Canvas iteration velocity
decisions.context: ENG-8941 destroy ephemeral env + ENG-8915 deploy workflow enable rapid Canvas prototyping. Canvas is 'Embed Deeper' pillar key product for collaborative decision-making.

arguments.for: Canvas needs fast feedback loops for UX iteration. Ephemeral envs reduce cycle time from days to hours. Infra work benefits all products.
arguments.against: Infrastructure investment with indirect customer value. Could delay feature work. Existing staging environments may suffice.

decisions.title: Resolve Foreign Key removal blockers for data model v2
decisions.context: ENG-6688 Foreign Key Removal for Run-Asset-Channels is legacy debt. Long ticket age suggests architectural decision needed. Blocks future schema evolution for multi-tenancy and scale.
decisions.blockedBy: Unclear migration path for existing customer data. Need decision on backward compatibility vs. clean break.

arguments.for: Technical debt constrains future architecture. Clean data model enables 'Embed Deeper' features like multi-workspace support. Old ticket = compounding interest.
arguments.against: High risk customer impact. Not blocking immediate features. Could defer 6 months while focusing on revenue features.

keyResults.name: Ask SIFT queries resolved without human

timeAudit.weekSummary: High meeting load consuming 80% of week. Only 2hr deep work blocks scheduled. 3 1:1s indicate team needs attention but limiting strategic thinking time.
